function.name: fetch_webpage
function.description: Fetch a webpage from a URL and extract its main content as clean Markdown. Uses Crawl4AI's HTTP-only crawler (no browser) with structure-preserving HTML-to-Markdown conversion, and falls back to a requests + BeautifulSoup extractor when Crawl4AI is unavailable or fails. Returns the extracted text plus metadata such as title and final URL.

timeout_sec.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds. A hard outer bound of timeout_sec + 15s is also applied to the Crawl4AI path.

max_chars.description: Maximum number of characters to keep from the extracted Markdown text. Raw HTML is archived separately for provenance at up to 2x this value.
